briefdescription.para: Initialize the XDmaPcie instance provided by the caller based on the given Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.The memory of the pointer references must be pre-allocated by the caller.
is the device configuration structure containing required HW build data.
is the Physical address of the hardware in a Virtual Memory operating system environment.It is the Base Address in a stand alone environment.

briefdescription.para: This function increments to next 1Mb page starting position of non prefetchable memory.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XDmaPcie Instance Pointer

briefdescription.para: This function Compare two different sizes.

parameterdescription.para: is First Variable to compare size
is Second Variable to compare size

simplesect.para: Difference of sizes, Zero for Equal

briefdescription.para: This function Aligns BAR Resources.

parameterdescription.para: Combination of Location and Offset value
Maximum Requested BARs
is a Bar Numbers

memberdef.argsstring: (XDmaPcie *InstancePtr, u32 Location, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u64 *Value, u64 *Size, u8 BarAllocControl, u8 BarNo)
memberdef.name: XDmaPcie_Assign32bBarMem

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the size of the BAR requested by the endpoint and allocates appropriate memory space from the available non-prefetchable memory window.

detaileddescription.para: It supports both AArch64 and other architectures via conditional compilation.
If the requested BAR size exceeds the available non-prefetchable memory, the function logs an error and returns without allocation.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XDmaPcie Instance Pointer
BAR configuration offset within the ECAM space.
is PCIe Bus number of the Endpoint
is PCIe Device number of the Endpoint.
is PCIe Function number of the Endpoint.
is a Combination of Location and Offset value
of the Bar Request
is to differentiate Unsorted and Sorted Bar Sizes
is the BAR index (0 to 5).

memberdef.argsstring: (XDmaPcie *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u64 *Value, u8 MaxBars, u32 *Index, u64 *Size, u8 BarAllocControl)
memberdef.name: XDmaPcie_BarMemoryAlloc

briefdescription.para: This function Allocates Bar Memory.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XDmaPcie Instance Pointer
is a Combination of Location and Offset value
Maximum Requested BARs,6 for EP and 2 for bridge
is a BAR Number
of the Bar Request
is to differentiate Unsorted and Sorted Bar Sizes

memberdef.argsstring: (XDmaPcie *InstancePtr, u32 Headertype, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function)
memberdef.name: XDmaPcie_AllocBarSpace

briefdescription.para: This function Composes configuration space location.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XDmaPcie Instance Pointer
u32 type0 or type1 header

simplesect.para: int XST_SUCCESS on success err on fail

briefdescription.para: This function starts enumeration of PCIe Fabric on the system.

detaileddescription.para: Assigns primary, secondary and subordinate bus numbers. Assigns memory to prefetchable and non-prefetchable memory locations. enables end-points and bridges.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XDmaPcie Instance Pointer
to scans for connected bridges/endpoints on it.

briefdescription.para: This function starts PCIe enumeration.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XDmaPcie Instance Pointer

briefdescription.para: This API is used to read the VSEC Capability Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.

is a VSEC register number as there are two registers. Possible values are.
XDMAPCIE_VSEC1 (0)
XDMAPCIE_VSEC2 (1)
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Vendor Specific Enhanced Capability ID.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will . pass back the Version of VSEC.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Next Capability offset.

briefdescription.para: This API is used to read the VSEC Header Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.

is a VSEC register number as there are two registers. Possible values are.
XDMAPCIE_VSEC1 (0)
XDMAPCIE_VSEC2 (1)
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the VSEC header structure Id.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Revision of VSEC capability Structure.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass . back the length of the VSEC capability structure.

briefdescription.para: This API Reads the Bridge info register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable indicating whether underlying PCIe block support PCIe Gen2 Speed.
is a pointer to a variable indication whether underlying PCIe block is root port.
is a pointer to a variable where it indicates ECAM size. Value is between 1 to 8. Total address bits dedicated to ECAM is 20 + ECAM size.

briefdescription.para: Read the Bus Location register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the bus number of requester ID assigned to IP.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the device number of requester ID assigned to IP.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the function number of requester ID assigned to IP.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Port number of requester ID assigned to IP.

briefdescription.para: This API is used to read the Phy Status/Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back Current physical status.

briefdescription.para: Read Root Port Status/Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the root port status.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Write Value in Root Port Status/Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is data to set.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Write MSI Base Address to Root Port MSI Base Address Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is 64 bit base address for MSI.This address should be 4kB aligned always.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if success or XST_FAILURE if failure .
This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Read Root Port Error FIFO Message.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the requester Id of error message.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the type of error message
is a variable where the driver will pass back the status of read operation of error message.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Clear Root Port Error FIFO Message.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Read Root Port Interrupt FIFO message Register 1 & 2.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the requester Id of error message.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the MSI address for which interrupt message received.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the type of interrupt message received (MSI/INTx).
is a variable where the driver will pass back the status of read operation of interrupt message.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the MSI data received.

simplesect.para: MsiMsgData if MSI interrupt is observed or 0 if there is no MSI interrupt.
This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Clear Root Port FIFO Interrupt message Register 1 & 2.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.Clearing any one Interrupt FIFO register clears both registers.

briefdescription.para: Read PCIe address translation vector that corresponds to one of AXI local bus bars passed by the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is AXI bar number (0 - 5) passed by caller.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will . pass back translation vector.

briefdescription.para: Write PCIe address translation vector that corresponds to one of AXI local bus bars passed by the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
is AXI bar number (0 - 5) passed by caller.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back translation vector.

briefdescription.para: Read 32-bit value from one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDmaPcie instance to operate on.
from beginning of IP own configuration space.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the value read from the specified location.

briefdescription.para: Write 32-bit value to one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
from beggininng of IP own configuration space.
to be written to the specified location.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset)
memberdef.name: XDmaPcie_ComposeExternalConfigAddress

memberdef.argsstring: (XDmaPcie *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 ATUConfigDataType, u32 ATURegionCntrl, u64 ATUAddress, u32 ATULimitAddress, u64 PCIeAddress, u32 RegionSize)
memberdef.name: XDmaPcie_ConfigureIATURegion

memberdef.argsstring: (XDmaPcie *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 *DataPtr)
memberdef.name: XDmaPcie_ReadRemoteConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: Read 32-bit value from external PCIe Function's configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: External PCIe function is identified by its Requester ID (Bus#, Device#, Function#). Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is the external PCIe function's Bus number.
is the external PCIe function's Device number.
is the external PCIe function's Function number.
from beggininng of PCIe function's configuration space.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the value read from the specified location.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex. The XDmaPcie_ReadLocalConfigSpace API should be used for reading the local config space.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDmaPcie *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 Data)
memberdef.name: XDmaPcie_WriteRemoteConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: Write 32-bit value to external PCIe function's configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: External PCIe function is identified by its Requester ID (Bus#, Device#, Function#). Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is the external PCIe function's Bus number.
is the external PCIe function's Device number.
is the external PCIe function's Function number.
from beggininng of PCIe function's configuration space.
to be written to the specified location.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex. The XDmaPcie_WriteLocalConfigSpace should be used for writing to local config space.

briefdescription.para: Implements all of functions for XDmaPcie IP driver except interrupts and initialization.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 tk 01/30/2019 First release
